AUTO_ARROWS.NAME: Automatic arrows resource roll
AUTO_ARROWS.HINT: Automatically roll resource dice for arrows when making ranged attacks with arrows.

COMBAT_AUTOMATION.NAME: Combat automation in chat
COMBAT_AUTOMATION.HINT: Enable combat action buttons in attack roll chat cards (dodge, parry, armor, apply damage).

ROLL.WARNING_NO_TARGET: No target selected for this attack.
ROLL.WARNING_NOT_TARGET_OWNER: You are not an owner of the target actor.
ROLL.WARNING_ACTION_FAILED: Action failed. See console for details.
ROLL.WARNING_INVALID_DAMAGE_TYPE: Could not apply damage: invalid damage type.
ROLL.WARNING_INVALID_DAMAGE_ATTRIBUTE: Could not apply damage: target has no valid damage attribute.
ROLL.WARNING_PARRY_NO_SHIELD_RANGED: Cannot parry a ranged attack without an equipped shield.
ROLL.WARNING_PARRY_NO_WEAPON: Cannot parry without an equipped melee weapon with Parrying.
